title: Nausea-friendly sample menu for the first trimester
excerpt: Small bland meals and snacks when morning sickness hits — not a substitute for treatment of severe hyperemesis.
content:
## Principles

- Very small meals every 2–3 hours.
- Prefer **cool or warm** foods with mild odor.
- Keep dry crackers by the bed before standing up.

## Sample day

- Early morning: dry crackers + water.
- Meal 1: plain rice porridge (cháo), boiled egg.
- Meal 2: pasteurized yogurt.
- Meal 3: rice noodles (bún) with lean boiled pork and blanched greens.
- Meal 4: banana.
- Evening: soft rice, lightly steamed fish with ginger, pumpkin soup.

## Avoid

Very spicy or deep-fried dishes if they trigger vomiting. **Severe nausea** — hospital care, not forcing food.
metaTitle: First-trimester anti-nausea menu | Bầu Ăn Gì? Blog
metaDescription: Soft, low-odor meals for pregnancy nausea in trimester one — NHS-aligned tips.
author: Bầu Ăn Gì? Team
